head.subject: feat: 실제 파일럿 증빙 계약 추가 and exact-source P12 workflow 제공

issues.message: Linked project metadata is ready for an operator-controlled preview start.
The target repository path, remote, branch, and working tree are ready for scope review.

nextAction.summary: Review the proposed files, scope, risks, and verification commands before implementation.

request.source:
{
  "kind": "design-ai-implementation-scope-request",
  "schemaVersion": 1,
  "objective": "Keep Website Console navigation compact on mobile so the active work surface remains visible in the first viewport.",
  "intendedBehavior": [
    "Render the mobile section navigation as one horizontally scrollable row.",
    "Keep every navigation target at least 44 pixels tall with visible focus and restore focus to the active tab after navigation.",
    "Preserve the existing desktop sidebar and all navigation behavior."
  ],
  "files": {
    "inspect": [
      "docs/website-console/app.js",
      "docs/website-console/styles.css",
      "docs/website-console/source-bundle.test.mjs",
      "docs/case-studies/website-console-real-pilot.md",
      "docs/PRODUCT-READINESS.md",
      "docs/PRODUCT-SPECIALIZATION-PLAN.md",
      "docs/ROADMAP.md",
      "docs/SESSION-LOG.md",
      "CHANGELOG.md",
      "mkdocs.yml"
    ],
    "change": [
      "docs/website-console/app.js",
      "docs/website-console/styles.css",
      "docs/website-console/source-bundle.test.mjs",
      "docs/case-studies/website-console-real-pilot.md",
      "docs/PRODUCT-READINESS.md",
      "docs/PRODUCT-SPECIALIZATION-PLAN.md",
      "docs/ROADMAP.md",
      "docs/SESSION-LOG.md",
      "CHANGELOG.md",
      "mkdocs.yml"
    ],
    "generated": [
      "evidence/p12/**"
    ]
  },
  "dependencies": [],
  "migrations": [],
  "externalWrites": [
    {
      "system": "GitHub",
      "action": "push branch",
      "destination": "sungjin9288/design-ai"
    }
  ],
  "verificationCommands": [
    "node --test docs/website-console/source-bundle.test.mjs",
    "npm run release:check"
  ],
  "risks": [
    "A horizontal row can hide later destinations unless native scrolling remains available to touch, trackpad, and keyboard users.",
    "Long section labels must stay legible without shrinking the 44 pixel touch target."
  ],
  "preExistingChanges": [],
  "release": {
    "commit": true,
    "push": true,
    "deployment": false
  }
}

value.objective: Keep Website Console navigation compact on mobile so the active work surface remains visible in the first viewport.
intendedBehavior: Render the mobile section navigation as one horizontally scrollable row.
Keep every navigation target at least 44 pixels tall with visible focus and restore focus to the active tab after navigation.
Preserve the existing desktop sidebar and all navigation behavior.
risks: A horizontal row can hide later destinations unless native scrolling remains available to touch, trackpad, and keyboard users.
Long section labels must stay legible without shrinking the 44 pixel touch target.

scope.objective: Keep Website Console navigation compact on mobile so the active work surface remains visible in the first viewport.
intendedBehavior: Render the mobile section navigation as one horizontally scrollable row.
Keep every navigation target at least 44 pixels tall with visible focus and restore focus to the active tab after navigation.
Preserve the existing desktop sidebar and all navigation behavior.
risks: A horizontal row can hide later destinations unless native scrolling remains available to touch, trackpad, and keyboard users.
Long section labels must stay legible without shrinking the 44 pixel touch target.

approvalGates.summary: Read only the approved file selectors during implementation.
Mutate only the approved change and generated-file selectors.
Respect the recorded ownership and handling of every pre-existing change.
Apply only the declared dependency changes; installation and network access remain separate.
Create or edit only declared migration files; running external-state migrations remains separate.
Write only the declared generated-file selectors.
External writes require a separate explicit approval and execution record.
Creating a commit requires a separate explicit gate.
Pushing changes requires a separate explicit gate.
Deployment requires a separate explicit gate.

issues.message: Repository identity, file selectors, verification, risks, and existing-change ownership are ready for human approval.

nextAction.summary: Review the immutable proposal and record a separate approval before reading or changing application source.

approver.name: project owner
approver.reference: User authorized autonomous completion and grouped commits in this Codex task; browser review expanded focus restoration scope

approvalGates.summary: Read only the approved file selectors during implementation.
Mutate only the approved change and generated-file selectors.
Respect the recorded ownership and handling of every pre-existing change.
Apply only the declared dependency changes; installation and network access remain separate.
Create or edit only declared migration files; running external-state migrations remains separate.
Write only the declared generated-file selectors.
External writes require a separate explicit approval and execution record.
Creating a commit requires a separate explicit gate.
Pushing changes requires a separate explicit gate.
Deployment requires a separate explicit gate.

nextAction.summary: Implement only the approved selectors, stop on baseline drift, and record P11 evidence before any release action.

executedWork.summary: Recorded source-linked P12 dogfood evidence: CHANGELOG.md
Updated source readiness with the completed dogfood and explicit MCP transport blocker.
Updated P12 specialization evidence and the compact MCP follow-up.
Closed verified Phase 790 dogfood checks and kept fresh MCP transport pending.
Recorded measured dogfood outcomes and the remaining transport gap.
Restored keyboard focus to the active Website Console navigation target after rerender.
Locked responsive navigation, focus restoration, and focus-ring behavior with focused tests.
Kept responsive navigation in one scrollable row and raised the focus ring to AA contrast.
Added the real-pilot case to the documentation navigation.
Published the claim-bounded internal pilot case with measured evidence.
Recorded source-linked P12 dogfood evidence: evidence/p12/browser/browser-verification.json

verificationResults.summary: All 25 Website Console focused contract tests passed.
The full release gate passed with 815 tests, 8 strict audits, 766 packaged files, warning-free docs, and installed-bin plus one-shot package smoke.

observations.summary: Keyboard navigation reaches every tab, scrolls the last tab into view, restores focus after activation, retains a 3px focus ring above 5.6:1 contrast, and keeps 44px targets.
Desktop retains the sticky grid sidebar; 390px mobile uses one 52px scrollable navigation row with no body overflow and visible work content in the first viewport.
Chrome Playwright runs completed with zero console errors and warnings, five repeated activations, reverse keyboard navigation, and reduced-motion preference enabled.
Website Console preserved and re-exported all 416,114 P12 source bytes with an unchanged SHA-256, then restored P11 after clear.
After the case study count was corrected, package inventory passed at 766 files and MkDocs passed with zero warnings and errors.

results.summary: All 25 Website Console focused contract tests passed.
The full release gate passed with 815 tests, 8 strict audits, 766 packaged files, warning-free docs, and installed-bin plus one-shot package smoke.

observations.summary: Keyboard navigation reaches every tab, scrolls the last tab into view, restores focus after activation, retains a 3px focus ring above 5.6:1 contrast, and keeps 44px targets.
Desktop retains the sticky grid sidebar; 390px mobile uses one 52px scrollable navigation row with no body overflow and visible work content in the first viewport.
Chrome Playwright runs completed with zero console errors and warnings, five repeated activations, reverse keyboard navigation, and reduced-motion preference enabled.
Website Console preserved and re-exported all 416,114 P12 source bytes with an unchanged SHA-256, then restored P11 after clear.
After the case study count was corrected, package inventory passed at 766 files and MkDocs passed with zero warnings and errors.

nextAction.summary: Implementation evidence is complete. Commit and later release actions still require their recorded gates.
